title: [CI:DOCS] Better document the default value of --userns
body:
Better document which value `podman run --userns` has if no 
value is specified. Also improve documentation of "host" being an alias
for "".

Fixes #15764

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

Thinking about it a bit more, the configuration file also provides a default value, which is probably between PODMAN_USERNS and the default --userns=host. I'll update the PR with that tomorrow.
